# Device metadata compatibility test data

The files in this directory contain device metadata streams written by
`metadataWriter`. The compatibility test checks that:

- the fully populated object generated by the current code matches `HEAD`;
- every stream can be decoded by the `devicemetadata` package; and
- decoding and re-encoding a stream does not change its bytes.

When an intentional API change alters the current stream, regenerate `HEAD`
and rerun the test:

```sh
UPDATE_COMPATIBILITY_FIXTURE_DATA=true go test k8s.io/dynamic-resource-allocation/kubeletplugin -run '^TestDeviceMetadataCompatibility$'
go test k8s.io/dynamic-resource-allocation/kubeletplugin -run '^TestDeviceMetadataCompatibility$'
```

Review the fixture diff before committing it. After each Kubernetes release
that includes this API, copy `HEAD` to a new directory named after the release,
for example `v1.37.0`. Released fixtures must not be regenerated.
